title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
